plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Safely Home to access your camera for facial recognition.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Safely Home to access your microphone.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Safely Home to access your location for ride tracking.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used for facial recognition during driver registration and login.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to find nearby drivers and track your ride.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access for video calls with support.
